greedy_noac.example_text:
to be a good person, to do good deeds, and to be a good citizen. This is the view of ____.
A. Confucianism
B. Taoism
C. Mohism
D. Legalism
Answer:
A

The main reason for the formation of the 'three highs' in oil fields is ____.
A. High water cut
B. High crude oil viscosity
C. High crude oil density
